summary: Tested Iteration 195 features: Surf Conditions API (Open-Meteo integration) and Instagram-style Post Menu. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend PostMenu component works correctly with different options for own posts vs other users' posts.

minor.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed - no single post GET endpoint exists. Not blocking but could be useful.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: PostMenu.js line 705-707: DialogHeader has sr-only class but DialogContent is missing aria-describedby - add DialogDescription for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Test posts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Surf Conditions API and Post Menu features are fully functional. Surf conditions endpoint uses Open-Meteo Marine API (free, no API key). Post menu shows different options based on post ownership. Known spots include Pipeline, Mavericks, New Smyrna, etc.

features_verified.user_favorites_add: PASS - POST /api/users/{id}/favorites adds post to favorites
features_verified.post_menu_own_post: PASS - Shows Delete, Edit, Hide like count, Turn off commenting, Go to post, Share, Copy link, About this account
features_verified.post_menu_other_user_post: PASS - Shows Report, Add to favorites, I was there too, About this account, Go to post, Share, Copy link
features_verified.post_menu_unfollow: PASS - Unfollow option only shows when following the author (conditional rendering works)

console_errors_noted: Failed to fetch bookings: AxiosError - 404 (not related to tested features)
Location access denied (expected in test environment)
